// THIS WAS GENERATED BY AI, THERE MAY BE ERRORS AND THIS CAN CAUSE DAMAGE TO YOUR PRINTER, YOU HAVE BEEN WARNED WARNED AND WARNED.

#include <Arduino.h>
#include <Adafruit_NeoPixel.h>

// ------------------------ Pins ------------------------
static const uint8_t PIEZO_PINS[3] = {A0, A1, A2};   // Piezo1, Piezo2, Piezo3
static const uint8_t ENDSTOP_OUT_PIN = D6;

// XIAO RP2040 NeoPixel pins
static const uint8_t XIAO_NEOPIXEL_POWER_PIN = 11;
static const uint8_t XIAO_NEOPIXEL_DATA_PIN  = 12;
static Adafruit_NeoPixel pixel(1, XIAO_NEOPIXEL_DATA_PIN, NEO_GRB + NEO_KHZ800);

// ------------------------ ADC ------------------------
static const float ADC_REF_V = 3.3f;
static const uint16_t ADC_MAX = 4095;

// ------------------------ Timing ------------------------
static const uint32_t TRIGGER_HOLD_MS = 50;
static const uint32_t TRIGGER_LOCKOUT_MS = 200;
static const uint32_t LED_HOLD_MS = 200;

static const uint32_t STARTUP_IGNORE_MS = 1500;  // ignore triggers while baselines settle
static const uint32_t BASELINE_INITIAL_DELAY_MS = 600; // extra settle before initial baseline capture

// ------------------------ Baseline Tracking ------------------------
// EMA baseline tracking factor: baseline = baseline*(N-1)/N + sample*(1/N)
static const uint8_t BASELINE_EMA_N = 96; // slower tracking = better rejection of slow drift

// Only update baseline when channel is "quiet" (diff below band)
static const float BASELINE_UPDATE_BAND_V = 0.050f; // 50mV

// ------------------------ Trigger Filtering ------------------------
// Primary “impulse/contact” gate: must be both far from baseline and changing fast
static const float DIFF_THRESHOLD_V  = 0.180f; // deviation from baseline
static const float SLOPE_THRESHOLD_V = 0.030f; // change per sample (fast edge)

// Backup “absolute peak” gate: if amplifier spikes high, treat as contact
// Tune this based on what you observed (~2.9V). Set below your observed hit peaks,
// but above any idle wander.
static const float ABS_HIGH_THRESHOLD_V = 2.80f;

// Qualification
static const uint8_t TRIGGER_CONSECUTIVE = 2; // consecutive qualifying samples per channel

// Multi-sensor decision:
//  - 1 = ANY sensor triggers (what you asked for; simplest)
//  - 2 = require 2 of 3 within WINDOW_MS (recommended once you mount all three)
static const uint8_t REQUIRED_SENSORS = 1;
static const uint32_t MULTI_SENSOR_WINDOW_MS = 20;

// ------------------------ LED ------------------------
static const uint8_t LED_BRIGHTNESS_IDLE = 8;
static const uint8_t LED_BRIGHTNESS_TRIG = 16;

// Colors (calm + visible)
static void setLedIdle(void) {
  pixel.setBrightness(LED_BRIGHTNESS_IDLE);
  pixel.setPixelColor(0, pixel.Color(0, 50, 80)); // soft blue-cyan
  pixel.show();
}
static void setLedTriggered(void) {
  pixel.setBrightness(LED_BRIGHTNESS_TRIG);
  pixel.setPixelColor(0, pixel.Color(120, 0, 120)); // magenta
  pixel.show();
}

// ------------------------ Utilities ------------------------
static inline uint16_t voltsToCounts(float v) {
  if (v <= 0.0f) return 0;
  float c = (v / ADC_REF_V) * (float)ADC_MAX;
  if (c < 0.0f) c = 0.0f;
  if (c > (float)ADC_MAX) c = (float)ADC_MAX;
  return (uint16_t)(c + 0.5f);
}
static inline float countsToVolts(uint16_t c) {
  return ((float)c * ADC_REF_V) / (float)ADC_MAX;
}
static inline uint16_t absDiff16(uint16_t a, uint16_t b) {
  return (a > b) ? (a - b) : (b - a);
}
static uint16_t readAdcAveraged(uint8_t pin, uint8_t samples) {
  uint32_t acc = 0;
  for (uint8_t i = 0; i < samples; i++) {
    acc += (uint16_t)analogRead(pin);
    delayMicroseconds(40);
  }
  return (uint16_t)(acc / samples);
}
static void endstopSet(bool high) {
  digitalWrite(ENDSTOP_OUT_PIN, high ? HIGH : LOW);
}

// ------------------------ State ------------------------
static uint32_t boot_ms = 0;

static uint16_t baseline_adc[3] = {0, 0, 0};
static uint16_t prev_adc[3] = {0, 0, 0};
static uint8_t consecutive_hits[3] = {0, 0, 0};

static uint16_t diff_thresh = 0;
static uint16_t slope_thresh = 0;
static uint16_t baseline_band = 0;
static uint16_t abs_high_thresh = 0;

// Endstop/LED timing state
static bool in_hold = false;
static uint32_t hold_until_ms = 0;
static uint32_t lockout_until_ms = 0;

static bool led_latched = false;
static uint32_t led_until_ms = 0;

// Multi-sensor window bookkeeping
static uint32_t recent_hit_time_ms[3] = {0, 0, 0};

// ------------------------ Setup ------------------------
void setup() {
  pinMode(ENDSTOP_OUT_PIN, OUTPUT);
  endstopSet(false);

  for (int i = 0; i < 3; i++) {
    pinMode(PIEZO_PINS[i], INPUT);
  }

  analogReadResolution(12);
  Serial.begin(115200);

  pinMode(XIAO_NEOPIXEL_POWER_PIN, OUTPUT);
  digitalWrite(XIAO_NEOPIXEL_POWER_PIN, HIGH);
  delay(5);

  pixel.begin();
  pixel.clear();
  pixel.show();

  setLedIdle();

  boot_ms = millis();

  // Let rails + piezo amps settle before capturing initial baselines
  delay(BASELINE_INITIAL_DELAY_MS);

  // Convert thresholds
  diff_thresh      = voltsToCounts(DIFF_THRESHOLD_V);
  slope_thresh     = voltsToCounts(SLOPE_THRESHOLD_V);
  baseline_band    = voltsToCounts(BASELINE_UPDATE_BAND_V);
  abs_high_thresh  = voltsToCounts(ABS_HIGH_THRESHOLD_V);

  // Initial baseline per channel
  for (int ch = 0; ch < 3; ch++) {
    uint32_t acc = 0;
    const uint16_t samples = 512;
    for (uint16_t i = 0; i < samples; i++) {
      acc += (uint16_t)analogRead(PIEZO_PINS[ch]);
      delayMicroseconds(200);
    }
    baseline_adc[ch] = (uint16_t)(acc / samples);
    prev_adc[ch] = baseline_adc[ch];

    Serial.print("Baseline P");
    Serial.print(ch + 1);
    Serial.print(" = ");
    Serial.println(countsToVolts(baseline_adc[ch]), 3);
  }
}

// ------------------------ Loop ------------------------
void loop() {
  const uint32_t now = millis();

  // LED latch management
  if (led_latched && now >= led_until_ms) {
    led_latched = false;
  }

  // Endstop hold management
  if (in_hold) {
    if (now >= hold_until_ms) {
      in_hold = false;
      endstopSet(false);
      if (!led_latched) setLedIdle();
    } else {
      endstopSet(true);
      setLedTriggered();
    }
    return;
  }

  // Lockout window to prevent retrigger chatter
  if (now < lockout_until_ms) {
    endstopSet(false);
    if (!led_latched) setLedIdle();
    return;
  }

  // Read all channels
  uint16_t adc[3];
  uint16_t diff[3];
  uint16_t slope[3];

  for (int ch = 0; ch < 3; ch++) {
    adc[ch] = readAdcAveraged(PIEZO_PINS[ch], 4);
    diff[ch] = absDiff16(adc[ch], baseline_adc[ch]);
    slope[ch] = absDiff16(adc[ch], prev_adc[ch]);
    prev_adc[ch] = adc[ch];
  }

  // During startup ignore: track baselines aggressively, no triggers
  if ((now - boot_ms) < STARTUP_IGNORE_MS) {
    for (int ch = 0; ch < 3; ch++) {
      baseline_adc[ch] = (uint16_t)((baseline_adc[ch] * (BASELINE_EMA_N - 1u) + adc[ch]) / BASELINE_EMA_N);
      consecutive_hits[ch] = 0;
    }
    endstopSet(false);
    if (!led_latched) setLedIdle();
    return;
  }

  // Baseline drift tracking (only when quiet)
  for (int ch = 0; ch < 3; ch++) {
    if (diff[ch] <= baseline_band) {
      baseline_adc[ch] = (uint16_t)((baseline_adc[ch] * (BASELINE_EMA_N - 1u) + adc[ch]) / BASELINE_EMA_N);
    }
  }

  // Per-channel trigger qualification
  bool channel_hit[3] = {false, false, false};
  for (int ch = 0; ch < 3; ch++) {
    const bool impulse_gate = (diff[ch] >= diff_thresh) && (slope[ch] >= slope_thresh);
    const bool abs_gate     = (adc[ch] >= abs_high_thresh);

    if (impulse_gate || abs_gate) {
      if (consecutive_hits[ch] < 255) consecutive_hits[ch]++;
    } else {
      consecutive_hits[ch] = 0;
    }

    if (consecutive_hits[ch] >= TRIGGER_CONSECUTIVE) {
      channel_hit[ch] = true;
      recent_hit_time_ms[ch] = now;
      consecutive_hits[ch] = 0;
    }
  }

  // Decide overall trigger: ANY, or require N-of-3 within window
  uint8_t hits_in_window = 0;
  for (int ch = 0; ch < 3; ch++) {
    if ((now - recent_hit_time_ms[ch]) <= MULTI_SENSOR_WINDOW_MS) {
      hits_in_window++;
    }
  }

  const bool should_trigger =
    (REQUIRED_SENSORS <= 1) ? (channel_hit[0] || channel_hit[1] || channel_hit[2])
                            : (hits_in_window >= REQUIRED_SENSORS);

  if (should_trigger) {
    // Serial: print which channels and their voltages (still short; only on trigger)
    Serial.print("Trigger on Piezo(s): ");
    for (int ch = 0; ch < 3; ch++) {
      if ((now - recent_hit_time_ms[ch]) <= MULTI_SENSOR_WINDOW_MS) {
        Serial.print("P"); Serial.print(ch + 1); Serial.print(" ");
      }
    }
    Serial.print("| V = ");
    Serial.print(countsToVolts(adc[0]), 3); Serial.print(", ");
    Serial.print(countsToVolts(adc[1]), 3); Serial.print(", ");
    Serial.println(countsToVolts(adc[2]), 3);

    // Latch LED for visibility
    led_latched = true;
    led_until_ms = now + LED_HOLD_MS;

    // Endstop pulse and lockout
    in_hold = true;
    hold_until_ms = now + TRIGGER_HOLD_MS;
    lockout_until_ms = now + TRIGGER_HOLD_MS + TRIGGER_LOCKOUT_MS;

    endstopSet(true);
    setLedTriggered();
    return;
  }

  // Idle
  endstopSet(false);
  if (!led_latched) setLedIdle();
}
